name: Lemon Cake (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) or Mark 5.
2. Grease an 8 inch x 10 inch baking dish.
3. Cream the butter and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
4. Beat the eggs in a basin and gradually beat into the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in the flour and grated lemon rind.
6. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared dish.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until springy to the touch.
8. For topping, mix the caster sugar with lemon juice.
9. While the cake is still hot, pour the mixture over the top of the cake.
10. Allow to cool in the tin and cut into slices.
